notes: Mostly playable. One screen (underwater) runs at slide-show speeds however, and you visit this screen 3 times in the game, which makes that bit annoying. Don't change the window size though, or switch to full screen, as it will cause the background to disappear sometimes.
title: Lilly Looking Through

notes: Runs with really bad framerates at times and fullscreen doesn't work.
